productDisplayName: Esprit Women Snake Turqouise Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Snake wrap-around analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Polished stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather band in snakeskin print with a buckle clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Turquoise blue dial with silver hands and 6 and 12 o& rsquo clock numbered markings Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
